mdRecord.dcterms:title: Summer Festival of Fun
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Playbill for the Barter Theatre Summer Festival of Fun. Productions inlcude: Don't Dress for Dinner, May 15- June 14 | Bear Facts, July 2- Aug 30 | Travels With my Aunt, June 25- Aug 31 | Alice... Through the Picture Tube, July 3- Aug 30 | Camelot, June 18- Aug 31.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Theater
Virginia
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
